disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe, unrelenting burning epigastric pain radiating to the back, escalating over 48 hours and NOT relieved by maximum-dose acid-suppression (esomeprazole 40 mg twice daily) or antacids
trigger_question_examples: Where is the pain and does anything make it better?
Have your usual stomach tablets helped at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a deep burning pain in the top of my belly that goes straight through to my back, and it's the worst it's ever been. The strong prescription tablets and antacids aren't touching it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Concurrent severe colicky left flank/loin pain radiating to the groin, in waves
trigger_question_examples: Do you have pain anywhere else?
Tell me about the pain in your side.
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: At the same time my left side and loin has a stabbing, cramping pain that comes in waves and shoots down towards my groin.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Chronic watery diarrhoea for several months
trigger_question_examples: Have your bowels changed at all?
Any diarrhoea or changes to your stools?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — I've had watery diarrhoea most days for months now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Significant unintentional weight loss over the past six months
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost weight without trying?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've lost a fair bit of weight over the last six months and I haven't been trying to.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Strong multi-generational family history of hormone-gland tumours; father died of a ruptured gastric ulcer; a sibling was recently diagnosed with a pituitary/brain tumour
trigger_question_examples: Does anything run in your family?
Any family history of tumours or gland problems?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My dad died from a burst stomach ulcer, and my sibling has just been told they have a pituitary tumour. Tumours in the hormone glands seem to run in the family.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recent episodic severe headaches with profuse sweating
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any headaches or sweating episodes?
Any episodes of feeling flushed, sweaty or having a pounding headache?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you ask — I've been getting bad headaches that come and go, with heavy sweating.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Intermittent over-the-counter ibuprofen (NSAID) use for kidney-stone pain, ongoing despite active ulcer symptoms
trigger_question_examples: What do you take for the kidney-stone pain?
Are you taking any anti-inflammatories like ibuprofen or aspirin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I take ibuprofen from the chemist when the kidney pain flares up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patient reports small painless lumps on the lips and the tip of the tongue
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any lumps or bumps anywhere, including your mouth?
Anything unusual on your lips or tongue?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now you mention it, I've got a few small painless bumps on my lips and the tip of my tongue.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone; in severe distress, pacing and unable to find a comfortable position
trigger_question_examples: Is anyone with you right now?
How are you coping at home with this?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I live on my own and I'm pacing around because I can't get comfortable — it's really frightening.
